phases.title: Draw Phase
phases.description: Start your turn by drawing a card.

phases.title: Main Phase 1
phases.description: Play cards, summon creatures or prepare your board.

phases.title: Combat Phase
phases.description: Declare attacks and engage the opponent.

phases.title: Main Phase 2
phases.description: Final preparations before ending your turn.

phases.title: End Phase
phases.description: Cleanup effects and pass the turn.

validations.errorMessage: Você deve focar no combate agora. Cartas só podem ser jogadas nas Main Phases.
Ação de {actionName} bloqueada nesta fase do jogo. Revise as regras do seu TCG.
